major.title: AURORA — Agentic AI Photo Editor
major.description: Mobile-first agentic AI photo editor integrating ~180M parameter vision models with ~3.2B parameter locally hosted LLMs for conversational, multi-step image editing workflows.
major.techStack: Python | FastAPI | React | React Native | PyTorch | ONNX | Ollama | Computer Vision | LLM Orchestration
bullets: Dual-mode AI architecture: Fast Agent (Gemma 3:1B, INT4) for <500ms edits + Thinking Mode (Llama 3.2 3B) for multi-step planning
3D Parallax generation (BiRefNet + Depth-Anything-V2 + MI-GAN + Three.js)
Real-time day/night & weather-aware transformations (ResNet152V2 + sky segmentation)
Object removal, segmentation (MobileSAM), inpainting (MI-GAN ONNX), and 4× super-resolution (SwinIR)
Voice-controlled editing via Deepgram STT (<2s latency)

major.title: Milo Mate — AI Customer Service Assistant
major.description: Privacy-first AI customer support browser extension leveraging Gemini Nano on-device inference for real-time multilingual communication, summarization, transcription, and content understanding.
major.techStack: Chrome Extension | Gemini Nano | RAG | FAISS | IndexedDB | Web APIs | Deepgram | Multimodal AI
bullets: Local RAG pipeline with semantic chunking (400-word chunks), 384D embeddings, and FAISS-style cosine/L2 similarity search
Real-time multilingual voice system supporting 9+ languages with automatic detection and <500ms latency
Live meeting transcription engine with queue-based 5-second audio chunking
90% reduction in documentation search time, 3× faster query resolution

major.title: RSNA Intracranial Aneurysm Detection
major.description: Competed in large-scale medical imaging challenge (~314GB DICOM dataset) to build a multi-label 3D aneurysm detection model across heterogeneous CTA, MRI, and MRA modalities.
major.techStack: PyTorch | MONAI | DICOM Processing | 3D Medical Imaging | RadImageNet | GRU/LSTM | NVIDIA T4
bullets: Hybrid architecture: RadImageNet pretrained CNN backbone + Bidirectional GRU for volumetric slice-wise context
Class imbalance handling with weighted cross-entropy (aneurysm weight = 13.0)
Achieved 0.59 ROC-AUC on validation/test
Preprocessed DICOM series to sorted volumetric .npy arrays with per-scan normalization

major.title: Nyxara — AI Digital Security Guardian
major.description: Full-stack, privacy-first digital security platform for breach detection, encrypted vault management, and AI-powered security advisory.
major.techStack: Flutter Web | TypeScript | Node.js | FastAPI | MongoDB | PostgreSQL | AES-256 | JWT | Groq | Llama-3.3-70B
bullets: XposedOrNot API for real-time breach scanning and historical compromise analysis
AI Security Advisor powered by Llama-3.3-70B via Groq API
Zero-knowledge vault: AES-256 client-side encryption, bcrypt hashing, PBKDF2 key derivation (100K iterations)
Clean Architecture + BLoC pattern with GoRouter navigation

major.title: Personal Portfolio Website
major.description: Responsive personal portfolio website using Flutter Web with Firebase integration for real-time data fetching and dynamic content management.
major.techStack: Flutter Web | Firebase | Dart | JSON | Firebase Hosting | CI/CD
bullets: Modular UI architecture with reusable components and structured state management
Firebase Hosting deployment pipeline with optional GitHub-based CI/CD
JSON-based local configuration for maintainable content management

major.title: AI Presentation Deck Analyzer
major.description: Command-line AI tool leveraging Gemini 2.5 Flash (1M token context) to detect factual, logical, and cross-slide inconsistencies in large PowerPoint decks (100–200+ slides).
major.techStack: Python | Gemini 2.5 Flash | Multimodal AI | Prompt Engineering | python-pptx | Pillow
bullets: Multimodal analysis: text extraction (python-pptx) + visual context ingestion (Pillow)
Single-pass large-context architecture (~50K–100K tokens per deck)
Structured JSON output for machine-readable reporting
No heavy frameworks — direct google-generativeai integration for fine-grained control

major.title: Dropout Society — AI Wellness Platform
major.description: Open-source multimodal AI wellness platform integrating computer vision, LLMs, RAG, and sensor data for personalized yoga, diet, and preventive healthcare guidance. iHub hackathon winner.
major.techStack: Flutter | Python (Flask) | Node.js | MediaPipe | Gemini 2.5 | Pinecone | Groq Llama 4 | MongoDB
bullets: Real-time yoga pose detection (30 FPS) using MediaPipe (33 keypoints) + Groq Llama 4 Scout 17B — 87% accuracy
Context-aware RAG pipeline (512D embeddings, Pinecone) with cross-feature intelligence
Multimodal medical assistant (text + image + voice + sensor) powered by Gemini 2.5 Flash
Personalized Indian diet planning with BMI-based calorie computation and regional cuisine intelligence

major.title: Agentic Real-Time Finance Tracker
major.description: AI-powered real-time financial management system integrating autonomous Fetch.AI agents for personalized budgeting, expense tracking, and investment insights. FrostHack 2025 winner.
major.techStack: Next.js | TypeScript | Python | Flask | RAG | Fetch.AI Agents | Pathway Vector Store | MongoDB | Docker
bullets: Autonomous Fetch.AI agents (User Agent + Finance Advisor Agent) for AI-driven financial recommendations
RAG pipeline using Pathway Vector Store for context-aware insights based on transaction history
Real-time monitoring with budget threshold detection and automated email alerts
Containerized multi-service deployment (Flask backend, AI agents, Streamlit dashboard)

major.title: Fertilizer Prediction — Kaggle Playground
major.description: Kaggle Playground Series (S5E6) multi-label classification challenge, optimizing Mean Average Precision at K (MAP@K) metric.
major.techStack: Python | Scikit-learn | Boosting | Feature Engineering | Data Augmentation
bullets: Improved baseline MAP from 0.2691 → 0.33517 → 0.35977 using boosting + external data
Robust cross-validation strategy aligned with MAP@K evaluation
Demonstrated data-centric ML: small volumes of high-quality external data boosted performance significantly

learning.description: Exploratory Data Analysis, Feature Engineering, Model Training (Ridge, Lasso), and Performance Evaluation.

learning.description: NLP classification using TQDM, Multinomial Naive Bayes, and custom Word2Vec model.

learning.title: Sentiment Analysis (ML)
learning.description: ML-based NLP problem with comprehensive text preprocessing of NLP text columns.

learning.title: IMDB Sentiment Analysis (RNN)
learning.description: Simple RNN architecture for sentiment classification with Keras .h5 model deployment.

learning.description: Understanding tokens, temperature, RAG, and LangChain fundamentals.

learning.description: Search engine tool using LangChain Agents and Tools with Streamlit frontend.

learning.title: AskSQL — NL to SQL
learning.description: Natural language query interface over SQL databases using LangChain SQL Toolkit with Groq LLM.

learning.title: Maths Solver (Gemma)
learning.description: Gen AI app using LangChain and Gemma model to solve math problems with LLMMathChain.

learning.title: LectureLens — Summarizer
learning.description: YouTube video and webpage summarization using LLaMA3-8B via ChatGroq.

learning.title: ANN End-to-End (TF & Keras)
learning.description: Sequential model for both regression and classification with TensorBoard logging and Streamlit deployment.

learning.title: Word Predictor (LSTM/GRU)
learning.description: LSTM-GRU-RNN based word predictor app deployed on Streamlit Cloud.

learning.title: Student Performance Prediction
learning.description: Full ML pipeline with modular structure, EDA, and model building.

learning.title: CodeGear — Coding Assistant
learning.description: Code Llama via Ollama for code understanding and generation with Gradio UI.

learning.title: BlockOps — Blockchain Ticketing
learning.description: Decentralized event ticketing on Aptos blockchain with NFT-based tickets, anti-bot protection, and royalty enforcement.
learning.techStack: Aptos | Move | React | Web3 | Petra Wallet
